DacTrung.title: NEOPERL FEATURES
DacTrung.exploreTitle: Discover water-saving accessory solutions for your home

About.title: ADVANCING
About.purposeDescription1: Neoperl believes that every drop of water matters.
About.purposeDescription2: We combine over 60 years of German-Swiss expertise with modern technology
About.purposeDescription3: to create smart water-saving solutions that deliver perfect water flow
About.purposeDescription4: and sustainability for every living space.
About.beliefDescription1: We believe in smart and sustainable water technology.
About.beliefDescription2: Neoperl focuses not only on appearance but also on optimizing every drop of water,
About.beliefDescription3: solving waste issues from the root.
About.beliefDescription4: For us, a good product must ensure drinking water quality,
About.beliefDescription5: save resources, and provide a perfect user experience.
About.beliefDescription6: That is why Neoperl pioneers world-leading aerator and flow regulator solutions.
About.technologyDescription1: Aerators are the “heart” of modern faucets.
About.technologyDescription2: Neoperl has researched and perfected this technology since 1959.
About.technologyDescription3: From splash-free water flow to integrating PCA (Pressure Compensating Aerator) water-saving technology,
About.technologyDescription4: we continuously improve to achieve maximum performance with minimal water usage.
About.technologyDescription5: Every component is carefully selected and strictly tested to ensure durability and outstanding efficiency.
About.innovationDescription1: The Neoperl Research & Development Center in Müllheim (Germany) perfectly combines European tradition with modern technology.
About.innovationDescription2: Since the 1970s, Neoperl has led the market with low-noise aerators.
About.innovationDescription3: We continuously develop water-saving products, check valves, shower systems, and smart hose connectors.
About.innovationDescription4: More than 60 years of experience enables Neoperl to deliver breakthrough solutions that meet the strictest global standards.
About.createdDescription1: Every Neoperl product is the result of German-Swiss precision and a commitment to sustainability.
About.createdDescription2: We create solutions that are not only durable over time but also environmentally friendly.
About.createdDescription3: From kitchens to bathrooms, Neoperl accompanies millions of families and projects worldwide.
